dangerDialog.title: Enable Full Access Mode
dangerDialog.description: In Full Access mode, AI will be able to automatically execute sensitive write operations, including deletions and modifications, without requiring step-by-step approval from you.
dangerDialog.warningBody: Enabling Full Access mode means you fully trust this agent. When handling files, databases, or sensitive configurations, AI misoperation may result in data loss or environment damage. Proceed with caution and ensure necessary backups are made.
